desc:
Blood pours from above; the land of gold lies beyond.
The spiral ahead loudly screeches.

It must have reached this depth after burrowing and burrowing.
Although it has no eyes, it creaks to face you.

result:
You continue to stare at its peculiar movements with yearning eyes.
It feels as though spirals of spikes are digging into your head.

From the excavated brain, geysers of hatred and contempt erupt.
It’s as if those feelings were inside you all along.

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Keywordless E.G.O Gift and a Bleed E.G.O Gift
result:
A Sinner seized the creaking spiral.
Unpleasant, metallic noise whirls, and its contemptuous gaze radiates in all directions.
The spiral strikes at the Sinner's heart.

successDesc:
The whirling spiral slows down,
showing forgiveness.

Reverence for a being of no significance
is followed by a slight self-contempt.

The spiral descended out of sight in the meantime.
failureDesc:
Though you turned away, it keeps pulling you in.
As if drawn by a magnet,
all eyes are pulled toward it.

The spiral has not forgiven.
Contempt for your hesitation to show the courage not to face it takes over.

You feel the encroaching spiral slowly dig its way in.

2: Win the battle to gain E.G.O Gifts "Perversion" & "Awe"
